questions: Best escape room themes ki ki?
Escape room e koto jon jete pare?
answers: An escape room is a physical adventure game where players are locked in a themed room and must solve puzzles, find clues, and complete tasks within a time limit (usually 60 minutes) to 'escape.'
Escape rooms work with teams of 2-8 people. You'll search the room for hidden clues, solve logic puzzles, decode messages, and unlock locks. Communication and teamwork are key to escaping in time!

Tips for escape rooms: search everything thoroughly, communicate findings with your team, don't overthink — sometimes the answer is simple, and ask for hints if you're stuck. Not all escape rooms are scary — many have fun themes.

Popular escape room themes include haunted houses, prison breaks, spy missions, zombie apocalypses, and mystery murders. Some are family-friendly while others are more intense. They're a fantastic group activity!
